name: Manuscript — Cultural Formulation in Underserved Populations
description: Draft and revise the book chapters on culturally responsive psychiatric assessment. Working through the outline, the case-vignette sections, and the references pass before sending to the editor.

name: Nova Syllabus Rebuild — PMHNP Psychopharmacology
description: Rebuild the spring psychopharmacology module syllabus for the Nova PMHNP program: refresh readings, rework the assessment rubric, and align objectives with the program committee revisions.

name: Office Lease Renewal — Coral Ridge
description: Checklist for the Bell Behavioral Health lease renewal at Coral Ridge Professional Center: review terms, confirm CAM charges with the landlord, loop in Anthony on the depreciation schedule, and sign before the Oct 2026 deadline.

name: APNA Talk — Culturally Responsive Assessment
description: Prepare the fall APNA conference talk on culturally responsive psychiatric assessment. Build the slide deck and speaker notes from the manuscript framework, and submit the handout to the program office.

name: Bell Clinical Press — CFI Pocket Guide Update
description: Revise the CFI Pocket Guide for the new edition to reflect the current cultural formulation interview supplementary modules. Mark up the proof and coordinate the reprint with the print vendor.

name: Bell Clinical Press — PMHNP Board Prep Refresh
description: Update the PMHNP Board Prep study guide question bank and rationales to match the current certification blueprint. Pull in two new pharmacology sections and re-tag the items.

name: Bell Clinical Press — Cultural Competence CME Workbook
description: Build out the Cultural Competence CME Workbook with new self-assessment exercises and an updated reflection module. Coordinate the CME accreditation paperwork with the provider.

name: Nova Fall Course — Cultural Competence in Psychiatric Practice
description: Build the fall Cultural Competence in Psychiatric Practice course for the Nova PMHNP program: lock the learning objectives with Prof. Cherry, assemble the readings, and set the discussion structure.

name: PMHNP Student Supervision — Spring Cohort
description: Coordinate clinical supervision for the six PMHNP students. Track precepting hours, sign off on case logs, and schedule the mid-term and end-of-term competency reviews.

name: NAMI Broward — Awareness Walk Volunteer
description: Help organize the NAMI Broward awareness walk: coordinate the resource table for Bell Behavioral Health, recruit two student volunteers, and prepare the stigma-reduction handouts.

name: Practice Finance — 2026 Books and Quarterly Reviews
description: Keep the Bell Behavioral Health S-corp books current in QuickBooks, run the quarterly reviews with Anthony Beaumont, and reconcile the Gusto payroll runs for Rachel, Marcus, and Danielle.

name: Insurance Panel Maintenance — Bell Behavioral Health
description: Keep the practice's payer enrollments current across Aetna, BCBS-FL, Cigna, United Healthcare, and Medicare. Track recredentialing dates and resolve any roster or CAQH attestation gaps.

name: Practice Website Refresh — bellbehavioralhealth.com
description: Refresh the Bell Behavioral Health website: update the provider bios for Rachel and Marcus, add the new-patient intake links, and tidy the speaking and publications pages.

name: Care Coordination — Rosemary
description: Coordinate Rosemary's care: keep the cardiology and PCP appointments on the calendar, confirm Margaret's Tuesday and Thursday aide schedule, and track her hypertension follow-ups.

name: Lanai and Garden — 2026 Season
description: Plan and tend the Victoria Park garden for the season: mango and avocado care, hibiscus and bird-of-paradise beds, and the herb planters on the lanai. Schedule the summer pruning and mulch.

name: North Carolina Mountains Trip — Fall
description: Plan the fall trip to the North Carolina mountains: book the Asheville and Blowing Rock stays, map out the Blue Ridge hikes, and line up the gallery and farmers-market stops.

name: PMHNP CME and License Renewal
description: Track Karen's continuing-education credits and the Florida APRN license renewal. Log completed CME, confirm the controlled-substance education requirement, and submit before the deadline.

name: HPSO Malpractice Renewal
description: Renew the HPSO malpractice coverage for the practice and the supervising-provider riders. Update the coverage limits and confirm the certificate is on file with the lease and the payers.

name: SimplePractice Workflow Tune-Up
description: Tidy the practice's SimplePractice setup: clean up the appointment-type templates, fix the superbill mappings, and standardize the documentation reminders for the clinical team.

name: Holiday Coverage Planning — Q4
description: Plan the practice's Q4 holiday coverage: set the on-call rotation with Rachel and Marcus, post the closure dates, and arrange crisis-line referral instructions for established patients.
